# Navarca Ship Management

> Navarca Ship Management LLC is an Abu Dhabi-based vessel operator, charterer and ship broker serving the offshore energy, marine logistics and coastal project sectors across the Arabian Gulf (Persian Gulf) and the wider GCC. The company charters, brokers and operates landing craft, offshore support vessels and other tonnage — owned or chartered, fully crewed and technically maintained — and delivers them ready for deployment.

## Company facts

- Legal name: NAVARCA SHIP MANAGEMENT - L.L.C - S.P.C (One-Person Limited Liability Company)
- Trading name: Navarca / Navarca Ship Management
- Founded: 3 May 2025, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
- Location: Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
- Email: contact@navarca.ae
- Website: https://navarca.ae

## What Navarca does

- Vessel chartering — time and voyage charters of landing craft, offshore support vessels and crewed tonnage in the Arabian Gulf.
- Ship brokerage — matching charterers with suitable Gulf tonnage for offshore, energy and coastal projects.
- Marine operations & vessel management — operating owned or chartered vessels with full crewing, technical maintenance and HSE oversight, partnering with specialist technical managers.

## Sectors and area served

- Sectors: offshore oil & gas and energy support, marine logistics and project cargo, coastal and shallow-draft Gulf operations.
- Area served: United Arab Emirates, Arabian Gulf / Persian Gulf, Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC).

## Contact

- Email: contact@navarca.ae
- Location: Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
